mechanics.text:
CHARAGTER CREATION
REBEL FIGHTER PILOT
Your parents were soldiers killed in the line of duty weeks after you were born, defending their home province of Andurien against the mad Captain-General Duggan Marik. Taken in by distant relations_ you spent your early years traveling from planet to planet in an attempt to avoid the authorities; even though the new Captain-General longer labeled Andurien and all its people as rebeb Ilious your family held grudge against the Mariks and aided separatist causes whenever possible. Spending SO much time in space acclimated you to the rigors of Iow gravity; and your flair for aerofighter sims prompted the Andurien resistance to secret: sponsor you for admittance to a exclusive military school. what started as ploy to get ahead, you built real friendship with the headmaster,? who saw your potential ad recom mended you for place in the prestigious Lloyd Marik Stanley Aerospace School: You graduated at the top of your class_ earning place in officer candidate school and commission in the FWLM; You served with distinction in the Seventh Free Worlds Legionnaires   during Operation  Guerrero, and you quickly earned promotion:= Your new rank and duties brought you to the attention Commodore Manfred Teauchborg your wing commander and staunch Marik supporter:  Determined make sure you grabbed no more headlines reassigned you backwater garrison duty.6 All your attempts to make it back t0 the front got tangled in red tape , even as your attitude earned you even more ire from the commodore who still holds grudge against you: Now; with lit: tle prospect for future in the FWLM; you are ready to serve with any unit that will give you real chance to fly:
